[2018-05-29 13:28] valgrim_the_demon (Rorvul): Is RFGAHDA overpowered?
[2018-05-29 13:32] wilson0862 (Wilson): Maybe I'm missing something but it is the worst Prismata unit I've ever seen. Why would it ever get bought?
[2018-05-29 13:33] wilson0862 (Wilson): It has the same stats as a wall except it's also frontline... and costs a wall.
[2018-05-29 13:40] valgrim_the_demon (Rorvul): It's red absorb, balanced by the fact your opponent can destroy it as if your opponent had a pocket apollo
[2018-05-29 13:41] wilson0862 (Wilson): It costs a wall. Therefore you already had wall absorb.
[2018-05-29 13:42] wilson0862 (Wilson): And 95% of the time, it would just be 3 soak. Except for very early on in the game.
[2018-05-29 13:43] valgrim_the_demon (Rorvul): It does cost a wall indeed. Anyway it's actually a joke piece about mono red absorb not being a thing
[2018-05-29 13:46] valgrim_the_demon (Rorvul): For context, start at How Much Would Red Pay For Literally Just A Wall
[2018-05-29 13:50] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): 10RR + Wall for a """Red""" non-Prompt Frontline Wall 🤔
[2018-05-29 13:51] valgrim_the_demon (Rorvul): That green frontline ability is actually even stronger: your opponent doesn't need to use or even have 3 attack to destroy the wall
[2018-05-29 13:52] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): what the fuck does that even mean
[2018-05-29 13:52] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): it dies if it takes any damage?
[2018-05-29 13:53] valgrim_the_demon (Rorvul): Nah, it means your opponent can click the half decent absorber to destroy it
[2018-05-29 13:55] valgrim_the_demon (Rorvul): It's a joke ability anyway, but think Frontline except no attack is needed (or think Frontline that treats your unit as 0:Health:)
[2018-05-29 13:57] wilson0862 (Wilson): I'm just annoyed you asked if a unit was op as a way to revive discussion about a joke unit.
[2018-05-29 13:58] wilson0862 (Wilson): How do you think frontline works though? Either you're very confused or you are not communicating well.
[2018-05-29 13:58] valgrim_the_demon (Rorvul): Eh red absorb is OP it's settled
[2018-05-29 13:59] valgrim_the_demon (Rorvul): Frontline lets you damage that unit directly, using up attack
[2018-05-29 14:04] wilson0862 (Wilson): Yes, you can use 3hp to kill a 3hp frontline unit directly.
[2018-05-29 14:05] wilson0862 (Wilson): So if you understand that, some of your statements are baffling.
[2018-05-29 14:05] wilson0862 (Wilson): " That green frontline ability is actually even stronger: your opponent doesn't need to use or even have 3 attack to destroy the wall"
[2018-05-29 14:05] wilson0862 (Wilson): Like what does that mean.
[2018-05-29 14:05] valgrim_the_demon (Rorvul): I think it's already clear red absorb is dead
[2018-05-29 14:06] wilson0862 (Wilson): Notice I have not once mentioned red absorb.
[2018-05-29 14:07] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): I think Elund means that you opponent can click if on their turn to instantly kill it without spending any attack.
If this is a "joke" unit, it's not very funny.
[2018-05-29 14:08] valgrim_the_demon (Rorvul): It's half one and half an honest attempt to balance red absorb
[2018-05-29 14:08] wilson0862 (Wilson): I would agree but I wanted to clear up mechanic misunderstanding if it existed.
[2018-05-29 14:09] valgrim_the_demon (Rorvul): But I digress, red absorb apparently isn't funny at all
[2018-05-29 14:09] valgrim_the_demon (Rorvul): We've officially hit full SSP
[2018-05-29 14:10] valgrim_the_demon (Rorvul): But SSP isn't that bad at unitmaking
[2018-05-29 14:11] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): It is, if you set it up as a clean joke.
Rexo Cell (8 :Gold: :Red: :Red: :Red: , 10 Supply) 4 :Health: 
:Prompt: , :Lifespan: 1
"Wow it's a red blocker with 4 hp, so it's totally red absorb.  And its funny that it has the same cost as Shadowfang, but a name/stats similar to Plexo Cell"
[2018-05-29 14:13] valgrim_the_demon (Rorvul): That red plexo cell is actually overpowered... if it actually had blocker
[2018-05-29 14:14] valgrim_the_demon (Rorvul): Without it, it dies before it can do literally anything, but is still a better blocker than rhino
[2018-05-29 14:16] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): I thought people agreed that :Prompt: implied :Blocker: , so we could leave :Blocker: off of unit cards to keep them cleaner.  (SSP was the only one who made units that could only block on their first turn).
[2018-05-29 14:17] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): Anyway, it probably makes Lucina and Shadowfang disgusting.  But that's fine because it's a simple, readable joke unit.
[2018-05-29 14:22] valgrim_the_demon (Rorvul): I've made units that use :Prompt: to mean no golden armor
[2018-05-29 14:32] leary93: Blegh can we not use established symbols to signify something that isnt established?
[2018-05-29 14:37] leary93: Like: Summoned gargantuan (10:Gold::Green: :Green: :Red: :Red:, 4 supply), 5 :Fragile:  
when bought: :Exhaust: 1 
start of turn: gain :Attack: :Attack: :Attack:
[2018-05-29 14:38] leary93: Since the difference between exhaust and buildtime is clear to most of us, its a lot more interpretable as no golden armor
[2018-05-29 14:39] leary93: Than giving it the prompt icon
[2018-05-29 14:40] valgrim_the_demon (Rorvul): Personally I see "when bought: :Exhaust:1" on a unit without :Time: or :Prompt: as a unit with :Time:1 and then :Exhaust:1
[2018-05-29 14:43] valgrim_the_demon (Rorvul): Then again, I don't know for sure how a :Exhaust: buy effect interacts with :Time:
